name: Tap Score Essential City Water Test
bestFor: Readers on utility water who want a broader baseline than a lead-only kit without immediately paying for the largest panel.
whyItFits: This sits in the middle: broad enough for a real baseline, still narrower than the advanced package, and easier to justify when the reader is checking a known utility-water concern.
watchout: It is still not the best pick when the concern includes a bigger range of byproducts, VOCs, or a more exhaustive city-water read after repeated problems.
evidenceNote: Tap Score says the Essential City Water Test includes 49 analytes with free shipping both ways and a 5-business-day turnaround.
